address.description: Postal address associated with the contact.

contact-count.description: Number of contacts represented in the extracted contact list.

contact-id.description: Identifier of the contact in the source platform or extraction output.

e-mail.description: Email address associated with the contact.

extracted-at.description: Date and time when the contact list was extracted.

extraction-reference.description: Reference to extraction artifact, report or case record.

extraction-tool.description: Tool used to extract the contact list from the device, SIM or cloud backup.

extraction-type.description: Acquisition type used to obtain the contact list.

full-name.description: Display or full name of the contact.

handle.description: Username, account handle or identifier linked to the contact.

job-title.description: Job title or role associated with the contact.

last-modified.description: Date and time when the contact entry was last modified on the source.

note.description: Additional notes stored with the contact.

organisation.description: Company or organisation associated with the contact.

phone-number.description: Phone number associated with the contact.

raw-base64.description: Raw contact-list record or export encoded in base64.

source-device.description: Device, SIM card or account where the contact list was extracted from.

source-platform.description: Platform or operating system of the source device/account.

text.description: Description and context of the extracted contact list.

description: Contact list object template for contact entries or aggregated contact-list extractions produced during forensic analysis (e.g. mobile extraction with Cellebrite, XRY or similar tools).
name: contact-list
